items.headline: Will Chet Holmgren like chicken feet? | How Hungry Are You?
items.description: Mafuzzy Chef Serge Ibaka is back for Season 6 and wastes no time turning up the heat. His first guest, NBA Champion Chet Holmgren, is served a Caribbean-style soup featuring chicken feet, one of Serge’s boldest dishes yet. Will he power through or tap out?

items.headline: Game Recap: Cavaliers 114, Raptors 102
items.description: The Cavaliers defeated the Raptors, 114-102, to clinch the series 4-3 and advance to the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

items.headline: Jarrett Allen posts 22 points, 19 rebounds vs. Raptors in Cavaliers' Game 7 victory
items.description: Jarrett Allen (22 points, 19 rebounds, 2 steals, 3 blocks) dominates all aspects of Game 7 as Cavs advance to the East semis.
